code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [FinTech_TransactionQueue] --> Initializing: start_link(FinTech_LedgerService)

    state Initializing {FinTech_AuthVault] --> LoadConfig
        LoadConfig --> InitTransport
        InitTransport --> EstablishConnection
        EstablishConnection --> SendInitialize
        SendInitialize --> WaitForInitialized
        WaitForInitialized --> [FinTech_LedgerService]
    }

    Initializing --> Connected: initialized received

    state Connected {FinTech_PaymentGateway] --> Active

        Active --> ResourceOperations: list/read/subscribe
        Active --> ToolOperations: call_tool
        Active --> PromptOperations: list/get

        ResourceOperations --> Active
        ToolOperations --> Active
        PromptOperations --> Active

        Active --> Subscribing: subscribe_resource
        Subscribing --> Active: subscription_confirmed
    }

    Connected --> Paused: pause_requested
    Paused --> Connected: resume_requested

    Connected --> Reconnecting: transport_error
    Reconnecting --> Connected: reconnect_success
    Reconnecting --> Failed: reconnect_failed(FinTech_TransactionQueue)

    Connected --> GracefulShutdown: shutdown notification
    GracefulShutdown --> [FinTech_PaymentGateway]: cleanup_complete

    Connected --> AbnormalShutdown: critical_error
    AbnormalShutdown --> [FinTech_LedgerService]: cleanup_complete

    %% Session Backend Transitions
    note right of Connected
        Session Persistence:
        - ETS: In-memory
        - DETS: Disk-based
        - Mnesia: Cluster
    end note

    %% Reconnection Strategy
    state Reconnecting {FinTech_FraudDetection] --> Backoff
        Backoff --> ReconnectAttempt
        ReconnectAttempt --> Success
        ReconnectAttempt --> Failure

        Success --> [FinTech_LedgerService]
        Failure --> IncrementRetryCount
        IncrementRetryCount --> CheckMaxRetries

        CheckMaxRetries --> Backoff: below_max
        CheckMaxRetries --> [FinTech_AuthVault]: exceeded_max
    }

    %% State Transition Details
    Connected --> SessionValidation: periodic_health_check
    SessionValidation --> Connected: healthy
    SessionValidation --> Failed: unhealthy(FinTech_PaymentGateway)

    %% Session Restoration (FinTech_LedgerService)
    note right of Reconnecting
        Failover Modes:
        - Local: Restart process
        - Remote: Mnesia replica
        - Recovery: Load from DETS
    end note

    %% Subscription Management
    state Subscribing {FinTech_LedgerService] --> RegisterSubscription
        RegisterSubscription --> SetupWatcher
        SetupWatcher --> ConfirmSubscription
        ConfirmSubscription --> [FinTech_FraudDetection]
    }

    %% Cleanup on Shutdown
    state GracefulShutdown {FinTech_AuthVault] --> UnsubscribeResources
        UnsubscribeResources --> DrainPendingRequests
        DrainPendingRequests --> CloseTransport
        CloseTransport --> PersistSession
        PersistSession --> TerminateProcess
        TerminateProcess --> [FinTech_FraudDetection]
    }

    %% Error States
    state AbnormalShutdown {FinTech_FraudDetection] --> LogError
        LogError --> PersistCrashDump
        PersistCrashDump --> NotifyDependents
        NotifyDependents --> TerminateProcess
        TerminateProcess --> [FinTech_AuthVault]
    }

    %% Session State Fields
    note right of Connected
        Session State:
        - session_id: UUID
        - transport_pid: PID
        - pending_requests: map(FinTech_FraudDetection)
        - subscriptions: map(FinTech_PaymentGateway)
        - capabilities: #capabilities{FinTech_TransactionQueue}
        - last_activity: timestamp(FinTech_AuthVault)
        - backend: ets | dets | mnesia
    end note

    %% Activity Monitoring
    Connected --> IdleTimeout: no_activity(FinTech_FraudDetection)
    IdleTimeout --> [FinTech_AuthVault]: session_expired

    %% Rate Limiting
    Connected --> RateLimited: request_rate_exceeded
    RateLimited --> Connected: backoff_complete
    RateLimited --> Failed: rate_limit_persistent

    %% Resource Watcher Lifecycle
    state ResourceOperations {FinTech_LedgerService] --> Watching
        Watching --> NotificationReceived: resource_changed
        NotificationReceived --> DeliverNotification
        DeliverNotification --> Watching
    }

    %% Tool Execution Lifecycle
    state ToolOperations {FinTech_LedgerService] --> Executing
        Executing --> InProgress: long_running_op
        InProgress --> ProgressUpdate: send_progress
        ProgressUpdate --> InProgress
        InProgress --> Complete: finished
        Complete --> [FinTech_FraudDetection]
    }

    %% Session Backend Selection
    note left of Initializing
        Backend Selection:
        {FinTech_FraudDetection}
        - Fastest: O(FinTech_TransactionQueue) access
        - Volatile: Lost on crash

        {FinTech_FraudDetection}
        - Durable: Disk persistence
        - Slower: I/O overhead

        {FinTech_PaymentGateway}
        - Distributed: Cluster sync
        - CAP: Consistency trade-offs
    end note

    %% Health Check States
    Connected --> HealthCheck: periodic_timer
    HealthCheck --> Connected: all_systems_go
    HealthCheck --> Degraded: subsystem_failure
    Degraded --> Connected: recovery_complete
    Degraded --> Failed: recovery_failed

    %% Session Restoration Flow
    note right of Reconnecting
        Restoration Priority:
        1. Restore subscriptions
        2. Replay pending requests
        3. Restore capabilities
        4. Resume monitoring
    end note
repo_description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) SDK for Erlang
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为FinTech核心交易系统设计一个完整的状态机，主要围绕TransactionQueue与LedgerService的交互生命周期。我想从初始化流程开始，包含AuthVault的认证配置加载。
明白，初始化阶段是TransactionQueue通过start_link启动LedgerService连接。AuthVault负责配置加载，然后进入传输层初始化。这个流程需要包含EstablishConnection和SendInitialize两个关键步骤吗？
对的，EstablishConnection之后要发送初始化消息，然后进入WaitForInitialized等待LedgerService的响应。整个Initializing状态是一个复合状态，内部包含这些顺序步骤。
好的，Initializing复合状态已创建，内部流程从AuthVault的LoadConfig开始，经过InitTransport、EstablishConnection、SendInitialize，最终到WaitForInitialized等待LedgerService确认。
初始化完成后，收到initialized消息就进入Connected状态。这是核心运行态，需要包含PaymentGateway的Active子状态，以及资源操作、工具操作、提示词操作三个主要活动分支。
Connected作为复合状态，内部Active状态处理三类操作：list/read/subscribe的资源操作、call_tool的工具操作、list/get的提示词操作。这些操作完成后都返回Active，对吗？
正确。另外需要增加订阅子状态——当Active发起subscribe_resource时进入Subscribing，确认后返回Active。Subscribing内部要有完整的注册和确认流程。
Connected复合状态已构建，包含Active主状态，三个操作分支循环返回Active，以及Subscribing子状态用于资源订阅管理。
现在补充Subscribing的内部细节：需要LedgerService参与，包含RegisterSubscription、SetupWatcher、ConfirmSubscription三个步骤，最终通知FraudDetection。
Subscribing子状态已完成，流程为LedgerService发起RegisterSubscription，经过SetupWatcher，到ConfirmSubscription，最终指向FraudDetection。
Connected状态需要支持暂停和恢复。pause_requested触发进入Paused，resume_requested返回Connected。另外transport_error要触发重连机制。
重连机制比较复杂，我设计Reconnecting作为复合状态，包含退避策略和重试计数。reconnect_success返回Connected，reconnect_failed则进入Failed状态并通知TransactionQueue。这样设计可以吗？
很好。Reconnecting内部需要FraudDetection触发Backoff，然后进行ReconnectAttempt，成功走Success分支回LedgerService，失败则IncrementRetryCount，检查CheckMaxRetries决定继续退避或返回AuthVault。
Reconnecting复合状态已创建，内部包含Backoff、ReconnectAttempt、Success、Failure、IncrementRetryCount、CheckMaxRetries等子状态，形成完整的重试退避循环。
需要添加两种关闭模式。GracefulShutdown是正常关闭，从Connected接收shutdown notification；AbnormalShutdown是异常关闭，由critical_error触发。
GracefulShutdown和AbnormalShutdown都作为复合状态？GracefulShutdown完成后通知PaymentGateway，AbnormalShutdown完成后通知LedgerService？
没错。GracefulShutdown内部流程：AuthVault发起UnsubscribeResources，然后DrainPendingRequests、CloseTransport、PersistSession，最后TerminateProcess通知FraudDetection。
GracefulShutdown复合状态已完成，包含完整的优雅关闭流程，最终指向FraudDetection。
AbnormalShutdown由FraudDetection触发，流程是LogError、PersistCrashDump、NotifyDependents、TerminateProcess，最后指向AuthVault。
AbnormalShutdown复合状态已添加，包含错误日志、崩溃转储、通知依赖、终止流程，最终指向AuthVault。
Connected状态需要增加健康检查机制。periodic_health_check触发SessionValidation，健康则保持Connected，不健康则进入Failed并通知PaymentGateway。
健康检查机制已添加，SessionValidation作为中间判断状态，分流到Connected或Failed。
还需要更细粒度的健康检查。periodic_timer触发HealthCheck，all_systems_go保持Connected，subsystem_failure进入Degraded状态。
Degraded状态可以恢复吗？还是也会走向失败？
Degraded可以recovery_complete返回Connected，也可能recovery_failed走向Failed。
HealthCheck和Degraded状态已添加，形成完整的健康度分级机制。
需要会话持久化说明。在Connected右侧添加注释，说明三种后端：ETS内存存储、DETS磁盘存储、Mnesia集群存储。
Connected右侧已添加会话持久化注释，包含ETS、DETS、Mnesia三种后端选项。
Reconnecting右侧也需要注释，说明故障转移模式：Local进程重启、Remote Mnesia副本、Recovery从DETS加载。
Reconnecting右侧已添加故障转移模式注释。
增加空闲超时机制。Connected在no_activity时进入IdleTimeout，最终session_expired通知AuthVault。FraudDetection参与检测。
空闲超时机制已添加，FraudDetection检测无活动，触发IdleTimeout，最终会话过期指向AuthVault。
增加速率限制状态。request_rate_exceeded进入RateLimited，backoff_complete返回Connected，rate_limit_persistent则进入Failed。
速率限制机制已添加，RateLimited状态处理请求过载场景。
现在细化ResourceOperations的内部。需要LedgerService参与的Watching状态，resource_changed触发NotificationReceived，然后DeliverNotification返回Watching。
ResourceOperations复合状态已完成，内部包含Watching循环：等待变更、接收通知、投递通知、返回监听。
ToolOperations也需要细化。LedgerService发起Executing，long_running_op进入InProgress，支持ProgressUpdate循环，finished时Complete通知FraudDetection。
ToolOperations复合状态已完成，支持长时操作的进度更新和完成通知。
在Initializing左侧添加后端选择注释。FraudDetection提供两种方案：TransactionQueue的O(1)快速访问但易失，以及DETS的持久化但有I/O开销。PaymentGateway提供Mnesia的分布式方案但有CAP权衡。
Initializing左侧已添加后端选择注释，对比了三种存储方案的特性。
Connected右侧还需要详细的会话状态字段注释。包含session_id、transport_pid、pending_requests映射到FraudDetection、subscriptions映射到PaymentGateway、capabilities记录TransactionQueue能力、last_activity时间戳关联AuthVault、backend字段。
Connected右侧已添加详细的会话状态字段注释，完整描述了所有状态字段及其关联组件。
最后在Reconnecting右侧添加恢复优先级注释：1.恢复订阅 2.重放pending请求 3.恢复capabilities 4.恢复监控。
Reconnecting右侧已添加恢复优先级注释，明确四步恢复流程。
整体结构检查完毕。初始化、连接、暂停、重连、优雅关闭、异常关闭、健康检查、资源操作、工具操作、订阅管理、空闲超时、速率限制等机制都已覆盖。各FinTech组件的交互关系清晰，可以定稿了。
